about.title: About
about.subtitle: I've been building backend software for a few years. I like understanding the business side and making things that actually work.
about.label: Focus
about.focus_backend: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL. I build APIs, connect services, and try to keep things maintainable, testable, and reasonably fast.
about.focus_enterprise: Worked with a3ERP integrations, .NET, and C#. That taught me that clean code is useless if it doesn't solve the user's problem.
about.focus_ai: Exploring how to integrate AI into business workflows. Not for fancy demos, but to automate the tasks nobody wants to do manually.

contact.description: If you have a project, an idea, or just want to talk tech, send me a message. I reply faster to email than LinkedIn.

metadata.home_description: Backend developer in Madrid. Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, a3ERP, .NET, and exploring AI for business automation.
